text: I am drawn in by the saturated hues and the sharp dimensions of this exhibit. The large 'R+D' on the wall signals a space steeped in the pursuit of knowledge—research, development, curiosity. But the glare, the blur, and the angled perspective unsettle me. It is as if technology and the intellect it produces are on full display, but I must peer through glass and distortion to attempt understanding. I feel a mix of anticipation—wondering what intelligence I might encounter—and a tinge of disconnection, as if I haven't yet found my place within this landscape of human innovation.
